JaneDoe_Wander_Default_1: $query SEASON Fall#Dialogue line that only shows in fall.|Alternative line for all other seasons.
JaneDoe_Wander_Default_2: $z JaneDoe_draw#If Jane Doe has a draw animation this will play it before she speaks.
JaneDoe_Wander_Default_3: Another line of dialogue for Jane Doe wandering around the farm.
JaneDoe_Wander_Default_4: $query !SEASON Winter#A line that shows in any season except winter.|A different line that shows only in winter.
JaneDoe_Wander_Default_5: Just a simple wandering dialogue line for Jane Doe.
JaneDoe_Wander_Tree_1: If you include '@' it will be replaced by the farmer's name.
JaneDoe_Wander_Tree_2: Do you think %pet would like to climb up trees?
JaneDoe_Wander_Tree_3: You can also use the names of %kid1 and %kid2 - but you should check first if they exist.
JaneDoe_Wander_Tree_4: $z patio#If Jane Doe has a patio animation that makes sense off the patio, this will play it.
JaneDoe_Wander_Tree_5: $query !SEASON Winter#Another line that shows in any season except winter.|A different line that shows only in winter.
JaneDoe_Wander_FruitTree_1: If you can't think of enough lines for Fruit Trees, you can mix in regular Tree lines like in the content.json file.
JaneDoe_Wander_FruitTree_2: Another wandering dialogue line for when Jane Doe is looking at a Fruit Tree.
JaneDoe_Wander_FruitTree_3: A third line of dialogue for Fruit Trees, this this one has Jane Doe very angry.$a
JaneDoe_Wander_Building_1: If you have an affectionate line, you might want the love portrait.$l
JaneDoe_Wander_Building_2: You can break long lines into two parts.#$b#The with this setup the second part will appear immediately the first disappears.
JaneDoe_Wander_Building_3: This is another way to break up long lines.#$e#The second part will appear next time the player talks to Jane Doe.
JaneDoe_Wander_Building_4: If Jane Doe has more than the standard 6 portraits, you could use the eighth one this way.$7
JaneDoe_Wander_Building_5: The first portrait is number 0, so to use the twelth portrait you would do this.$11
JaneDoe_Wander_Water_1: $z JaneDoe_ThaiChi#If Jane Doe has a Thai Chi animation this will play it before she speaks.
JaneDoe_Wander_Water_2: Typically in English about 24 words fit on a single screen.#$b#The game will automatically wrap them, but it's better to control the breaks yourself.
JaneDoe_Wander_Water_3: Water lines can be any type of water like a pond, river, or lake.
JaneDoe_Wander_Water_5: There are a lot more codes you can put into dialogue lines.#$b#Refer to the modding documentation for details.
JaneDoe_Wander_Scenic_1: Scenic lines are fallbacks if you don't have specific lines for Trees, Water, etc
JaneDoe_Wander_Scenic_2: They can usefully be added to the random pools for those types to add variety.
JaneDoe_Wander_Scenic_3: A third scenic wandering dialogue line for Jane Doe.
JaneDoe_Wander_Seat_1: Seat lines will be shown when Jane Doe is sitting on a seat on the farm.
JaneDoe_Wander_Seat_2: The sitting animation should be defined in the animations.json file for Jane Doe, or this won't be seen.
JaneDoe_Wander_Seat_3: Don't specify any animations here. Wandering Spouses will handle that automatically.
JaneDoe_Wander_Seat_4: A fourth wandering dialogue line for Jane Doe when she is sitting down.
JaneDoe_Wander_Seat_5: A fifth wandering dialogue line for Jane Doe when she is sitting down.
JaneDoe_Wander_Barn_1: Barn lines are used outside of any type of barn - basic, big or deluxe.
JaneDoe_Wander_Barn_2: You can also create lines for 'BigBarn' and 'DeluxeBarn' if you want to be that specific.
JaneDoe_Wander_Barn_3: Barn tag lines will only be shown if no specific animal tags (like 'Barn_Cow') are present.
JaneDoe_Wander_Barn_4: It can be useful to mix Barn lines into the 'Barn_Cow' pool to add variety where the lines work whether or not there are Cows.
JaneDoe_Wander_Barn_5: $query SEASON Spring Summer#This line will only be shown in spring and summer.|This line will be shown in fall and winter.
JaneDoe_Wander_Barn_Cow_1: Barn Cow lines will be shown when there is at least one cow in the barn.
JaneDoe_Wander_Barn_Cow_2: Barn Cow lines will be shown for both White Cows and Brown Cows.
JaneDoe_Wander_Barn_Cow_3: You could also specify lines for 'Barn_WhiteCow' if you wanted to be that specific.
JaneDoe_Wander_Barn_Cow_4: You can create lines for any animal type that lives in barns like Sheep, Pigs, etc.
JaneDoe_Wander_Barn_Cow_5: If more than one type of barn animal is present, the one to show is chosen randomly.
JaneDoe_Wander_Coop_1: Much the same rules apply for Coop lines as for Barn lines.
JaneDoe_Wander_Coop_2: You can create lines for specific coop animal types like 'Coop_Chicken', 'Coop_Duck', etc.
JaneDoe_Wander_Coop_3: Coop will match any type of coop basic, big or deluxe.
JaneDoe_Wander_Coop_4: Another wandering dialogue line for when Jane Doe is near the coop.
JaneDoe_Wander_Coop_5: A fifth wandering dialogue line for when Jane Doe is near the coop.
JaneDoe_Wander_Coop_Chicken_1: Chickens are so funny. I wonder if there are people who are scared of them?
JaneDoe_Wander_Coop_Chicken_2: It can be any type of chicken like white, brown, void, gold or blue.
JaneDoe_Wander_Coop_Chicken_3: You can also create lines for specific types like 'Coop_WhiteChicken' if you want to be that specific.
JaneDoe_Wander_Coop_Chicken_4: Like for the barn you can crate lines for other coop animals like ducks, rabbits, etc.
JaneDoe_Wander_Coop_Chicken_5: If more than one type of coop animal is present, the one to show is chosen randomly.
JaneDoe_Wander_BrokenFence_1: A line to show when Jane Doe is inspecting a broken fence.
JaneDoe_Wander_BrokenFence_2: Another line for when Jane Doe is looking at a broken fence.
JaneDoe_Wander_BrokenFence_3: Yet another line for when Jane Doe is near a broken fence.
JaneDoe_Wander_BrokenFence_4: Jane won't actually fix the fence, but she might comment on it.
JaneDoe_Wander_BrokenFence_5: A fifth line for when Jane Doe is inspecting a broken fence.
JaneDoe_Wander_Farmer_1: This line will show when Jane Doe has just wandered to the farmer.
JaneDoe_Wander_Farmer_2: Of course the farmer might have moved since Jane Doe started wandering.
JaneDoe_Wander_Farmer_3: When wandering to the farmer is a good time to use the 'love' portrait.$l
JaneDoe_Wander_Farmer_4: A fourth wandering dialogue line for Jane Doe when she reaches the farmer.
JaneDoe_Wander_Farmer_5: A fifth wandering dialogue line for Jane Doe when she reaches the farmer.
JaneDoe_Wander_Patio_1: $z patio#On the patio it usually makes sense to use the patio animation.
JaneDoe_Wander_Patio_2: $z patio#Many patio animations look weird elsewhere, which makes spouses angry.$a
JaneDoe_Wander_Patio_3: $z patio#A third patio line for Jane Doe.$1
JaneDoe_Wander_Patio_4: It isn't necessary to use the patio animation on the patio, but some patios look odd if you don't.$1
JaneDoe_Wander_Patio_5: $z patio#A fifth patio line for Jane Doe.$1
JaneDoe_Wander_MatureCrop_1: Mature Crop lines will be shown when Jane Doe is near a fully grown crop.
JaneDoe_Wander_MatureCrop_2: You can create lines for specific crop types like 'MatureCrop_Parsnip' if you want to be that specific.
JaneDoe_Wander_MatureCrop_3: These lines will be shown however Jane Doe feels about the crop.
JaneDoe_Wander_MatureCrop_4: If you don't specify specific crop types, these lines will be used for all mature crops.
JaneDoe_Wander_MatureCrop_5: $z JaneDoe_draw#You can use animations on any row, so this would have Jane Doe draw before speaking.
JaneDoe_Wander_LovedCrop_1: Loved Crop lines will be shown when Jane Doe is looking at a crop she loves.
JaneDoe_Wander_LovedCrop_2: You can create lines for specific crop types like 'LovedCrop_Parsnip' if Jane Doe loves more than one crop.
JaneDoe_Wander_LovedCrop_3: These lines will be shown however mature the crop is as long as Jane Doe loves it.
JaneDoe_Wander_LovedCrop_4: So the lines need to make sense for anything from seeds to fully grown crops.
JaneDoe_Wander_LovedCrop_5: If a line needs a crop to be fully grown, use the 'MatureCrop' tag instead.
JaneDoe_Wander_JunimoHut_1: You can creaste wandering dialogue lines for any farm building, including the Junimo Hut.
JaneDoe_Wander_JunimoHut_2: A second wandering dialogue line for when Jane Doe is near the Junimo Hut.
JaneDoe_Wander_JunimoHut_3: A third wandering dialogue line for when Jane Doe is near the Junimo Hut.
JaneDoe_Wander_JunimoHut_4: A fourth wandering dialogue line for when Jane Doe is near the Junimo Hut.
JaneDoe_Wander_JunimoHut_5: A fifth wandering dialogue line for when Jane Doe is near the Junimo Hut.
JaneDoe_Wander_Shed_1: You can also create wandering dialogue lines for other farm buildings like the Shed.
JaneDoe_Wander_Shed_2: $z JaneDoe_draw#They can include animations and emotions too, just like other lines.$u
JaneDoe_Wander_Shed_3: A third wandering dialogue line for when Jane Doe is near the Shed.
JaneDoe_Wander_Shed_4: A fourth wandering dialogue line for when Jane Doe is near the Shed.
JaneDoe_Wander_Shed_5: A fifth wandering dialogue line for when Jane Doe is near the Shed.
JaneDoe_Wander_Cave_1: These lines will be shown when Jane Doe is near the farm cave.
JaneDoe_Wander_Cave_2: If you don't use a query string the line will show regardless of cave contents.
JaneDoe_Wander_Cave_3: $query FARM_CAVE Mushrooms#This line will only show if there are mushrooms in the cave.|This line will show if there are bats in the cave.
JaneDoe_Wander_Cave_4: $query FARM_CAVE Mushrooms#Another line that shows if there are mushrooms in the cave.|Another line that shows if there are bats in the cave.
JaneDoe_Wander_Cave_5: If all of the lines depend on the cave contents you can put the query in the content.json file instead.
JaneDoe_Wander_GrandpaShrine_1: Grandpas Shrine is good for reflective, sentimental lines.
JaneDoe_Wander_GrandpaShrine_2: It is possible to be married before the end of year 2, so you can't assume the torches are lit.
JaneDoe_Wander_GrandpaShrine_3: Another reflective line for when Jane Doe is near Grandpa's Shrine.
JaneDoe_Wander_GrandpaShrine_4: Things can get very deep, so you might need the sad portrait.$2
JaneDoe_Wander_GrandpaShrine_5: A fifth reflective line for when Jane Doe is near Grandpa's Shrine.
JaneDoe_Wander_Stable_1: A line for use by the stable. You can assume a horse is present.
JaneDoe_Wander_Stable_2: How does Jane relate to horses? Is she comfortable around them?
JaneDoe_Wander_Stable_3: $query SEASON Spring Summer#The horse probably feels different in spring and summer.|A different feeling in fall and winter.
JaneDoe_Wander_Stable_8: The numbers are arbitrary - just make sure they match the numbers in content.json.
JaneDoe_Wander_Stable_OneTwoThree: In fact they are just labels - you can use words instead of numbers if you prefer.
JaneDoe_Wander_Greenhouse_Fixed_1: This line will be shown when Jane Doe is near the greenhouse and it has been fixed up.
JaneDoe_Wander_Greenhouse_Fixed_2: This uses a query string in the content.json file, but you could also put it here.
JaneDoe_Wander_Greenhouse_Fixed_3: Can't use animations if the divide between fixed and broken is in the content.json file.
JaneDoe_Wander_Greenhouse_Fixed_4: If you want to use animations with the greenhouse put the query string on each greenhouse line in this file.
JaneDoe_Wander_Greenhouse_1: A line for when Jane Doe is near the greenhouse, regardless of its condition.
JaneDoe_Wander_Greenhouse_2: These lines will be included in both the fixed and broken pools unless you use a query string.
JaneDoe_Wander_Greenhouse_Broken_1: This line will be shown when Jane Doe is near the greenhouse and it is still broken.
JaneDoe_Wander_Greenhouse_Broken_2: Actually the query checkes if the player has been into the greenhouse.
JaneDoe_Wander_Greenhouse_Broken_3: Maybe the greenhouse is fixed but not yet visited, but that seems unlikely.
JaneDoe_Wander_FishPond_1: $query SEASON Spring#A line that only shows in spring.|Alternative line for all other seasons.
JaneDoe_Wander_FishPond_2: A second wandering dialogue line for when Jane Doe is near a fish pond.
JaneDoe_Wander_FishPond_3: Another line for when Jane Doe is looking at a fish pond.
JaneDoe_Wander_FishPond_4: Yet another line for when Jane Doe is near a fish pond.
JaneDoe_Wander_FishPond_5: $z JaneDoe_ThaiChi#You can use animations and emotions in any wandering dialogue line.$u#$b#Except for sitting.
